assessment.note: She names uncertainty about when to decide versus escalate, which is a mild negative clarity signal and a concrete decision-rights thread.

new_queue.label: Decide vs escalate
new_queue.name: In which situations is decide versus escalate still hardest to judge?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific moments where decision rights still feel ambiguous.

new_queue.label: Alignment pressure
new_queue.name: What part of cross-functional alignment is taking more energy than it should?
new_queue.description: Finds the moments where she is spending effort decoding or smoothing instead of moving work forward.

new_queue.label: Consensus trap
new_queue.name: Where are you still waiting for consensus when you probably need a decision?
new_queue.description: Surfaces hesitation to move from alignment-seeking into decisive action.

new_queue.label: Partner expectations
new_queue.name: Which partner expectation feels hardest to read right now?
new_queue.description: Identifies the stakeholder relationship where expectations are most ambiguous or misaligned.

new_queue.label: Support from me
new_queue.name: What would make my support more useful for you this month?
new_queue.description: Lets her name the guardrails, context, or escalation help she wants from her manager.

new_queue.label: Next decision
new_queue.name: What's the next decision you want to have made by our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete decision or outcome she wants to move forward before the next conversation.
